reasoning: The control SI-4(1) focuses on system-wide intrusion detection. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to enabling audit logs for detecting suspicious activities, using admission controllers to enforce security policies, and integrating with service mesh solutions that offer intrusion detection capabilities. While Kubernetes does not have a built-in intrusion detection system like cloud providers, these functions represent the closest equivalents.
